message:
feat(gen_server,supervision,spork,trace): typed OTP system message payloads, supervision tree enhancements, and expanded trace event taxonomy

Introduce ergonomic typed payload structs for OTP-style system messages
(DownMsg, ExitMsg, TimeoutMsg) with bidirectional From/TryFrom conversions
to and from the existing SystemMsg enum, preserving the deterministic
sort_key ordering contract. This gives callers a struct-based construction
path instead of requiring manual enum variant construction, while the
underlying SystemMsg ordering machinery remains unchanged.

Supervision tree (src/supervision.rs):
- Extend ChildSpec and SupervisorBuilder with richer lifecycle hooks
- Add supervision strategy configuration for restart policies
- Wire supervisor-owned region semantics for cancel-correct shutdown

Spork protocol (src/spork.rs):
- Refine deterministic mailbox drain and finalize sequences
- Align request→drain→finalize shutdown path with supervision tree

Trace event taxonomy (src/trace/event.rs):
- Expand TraceEventKind with stable snake_case names and required fields
- Add monitor_created, monitor_dropped, down_delivered, link_created,
  link_dropped, exit_delivered event kinds for full OTP observability
- All new events carry contractually stable field sets for tooling

Includes roundtrip conversion test verifying DownMsg/ExitMsg/TimeoutMsg
→ SystemMsg → typed payload fidelity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
